testcase.name: find id
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › test_visibility.test.ts:3:5 › find id ───────────────────────────────────────────────
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: locator('.sidebar-menu') Expected: visible Timeout: 15000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 15000ms - waiting for locator('.sidebar-menu')
8 | 9 | // Wait for dashboard > 10 | await expect(page.locator('.sidebar-menu')).toBeVisible({ timeout: 15000 }); | ^ 11 | 12 | await page.goto('https://smokevanaerp.phantasm-agents.ai/products/create'); 13 | await expect(page.locator('form#product_add_form')).toBeVisible({ timeout: 15000 }); at C:\Users\PSHCPU003\Documents\Automation Playwright\Smokevana ERP\tests\test_visibility.test.ts:10:49
